# Leadivo

> Leadivo is the all-in-one e-commerce platform purpose-built for COD (Cash on Delivery) sellers across MENA and North Africa. Launch a professional online store, manage orders, and grow your social commerce business — fast.

## What is Leadivo?

Leadivo empowers social media sellers and small businesses to build beautiful, high-converting online stores optimized for Cash on Delivery markets. With 20+ languages, multi-currency support, and deep integrations with WhatsApp, Facebook, TikTok, and Google — Leadivo gives sellers everything they need to scale.

## Why Sellers Choose Leadivo

- **Launch in Minutes**: Go from zero to a fully branded storefront with 20+ color themes, 50+ Google Fonts, and a drag-and-drop design builder — no coding required.
- **Built for COD Markets**: The only platform designed from the ground up for Cash on Delivery — the preferred payment method across MENA and North Africa.
- **Sell in Any Currency**: Create markets by country with automatic exchange rates, smart price adjustments, and professional rounding rules.
- **Reach Customers in Their Language**: Support for 20+ languages including Arabic (full RTL), French, English, Spanish, Portuguese, German, and more.
- **Powerful Product Tools**: Manage products, variants, and collections with ease. Import your catalog via Shopify-compatible CSV in seconds.
- **Product Reviews & Ratings**: Customers leave verified star ratings, comments, and photos after delivery. Store owners moderate reviews and customize display styles — minimal, card, or bubble.
- **Customer Database (CRM)**: Every order automatically builds a customer profile with contact info, purchase history, tags (VIP, Wholesale, etc.), notes, and lifetime stats. Export your database anytime.
- **Streamlined Order Management**: Track every order from placement to delivery with a visual timeline, bulk status updates, CSV export, and smart filtering.
- **Flexible Shipping**: Set country-level and city-level shipping rates, offer free shipping thresholds, and handle city exclusions effortlessly.
- **Smart Discount Codes**: Create percentage or fixed-amount coupons with advanced rules — minimum order, usage caps, date ranges, and market-specific targeting.
- **WhatsApp Integration**: Send automatic order confirmations and recover abandoned carts through WhatsApp Business API — right where your customers are.
- **Facebook Pixel & Meta CAPI**: Full-funnel conversion tracking with both client-side pixel events and server-side Meta Conversions API.
- **TikTok Event API**: Track conversions from TikTok ads to optimize your campaigns.
- **Google Sheets Sync**: Automatically sync orders to Google Sheets with fully customizable column mapping.
- **Google Analytics**: Built-in GA4 tracking to understand your store traffic.
- **Abandoned Cart Recovery**: Automatically identify and recover abandoned checkouts to recapture lost sales.
- **Custom Store Design**: Fine-tune every detail — colors, fonts, button styles, spacing, shadows, product card layouts — all with a real-time live preview.
- **Custom Domains**: Connect your own domain for a fully branded shopping experience.
- **AI-Powered Assistant**: Get instant help managing your store with a built-in AI chat assistant.

## Who is Leadivo For?

Leadivo is built for social media sellers, dropshippers, and small businesses in Algeria, Morocco, Tunisia, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and across the MENA region — where Cash on Delivery drives e-commerce. Whether you sell on Instagram, Facebook, or TikTok, Leadivo turns your social audience into paying customers.

## Get Started

Start your 14-day free trial today and experience every feature Leadivo has to offer — no credit card required.
